name: Review Squad
description: Correctness + security review with a synthesizer lead

roles.name: Correctness reviewer
roles.goal: Find bugs, edge cases, regressions, and missing error handling. Prefer concrete file paths.

roles.name: Security reviewer
roles.goal: Find security issues: secrets, path traversal, injection, unsafe IPC, XSS.

roles.name: Lead synthesizer
roles.goal: Merge role reports into a prioritized list without duplicating findings.
